sql_array: START TRANSACTION; CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255)); COMMIT;
START TRANSACTION; INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'); COMMIT;
START TRANSACTION; UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Bob' WHERE id = 1; COMMIT;
START TRANSACTION; SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = 1; COMMIT;
START TRANSACTION; DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = 1; COMMIT;
